case_title: STEPHEN D. FINESTONE VS. JAMES YETT

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER FINESTONE, STEPHEN D. AS TO RESPONDENT YETT, JAMES AKA JIM YETT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FINESTONE, STEPHEN D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YETT, JAMES AKA JIM YETT $5,420.84 PRINCIPAL, $244.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,664.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PETITIONER FINESTONE, STEPHEN D.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF STEPHEN FINESTONE'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONFIRMATION. ARBITRATION CONFIRMED. PETITION TO VACATE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO COST AMOUNT IS OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

James Yett, 650-814-1116 respondent and opposing party appearing propria persona

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
PLAINTIFF STEPHEN FINESTONE'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm. ARBITRATION CONFIRMED. PETITION TO VACATE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO COST AMOUNT IS OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB/AL)
